message.thinking: We need to evaluate the given text (the beginning of thesis introduction) against the five questions. The text is basically a template for the introduction, not the actual content. It lists structure and formatting guidelines. It does not discuss the topic or significance, state-of-the-art, gap, problem, references. So all five will likely be non-compliant. Provide feedback accordingly. Provide JSON array with 5 objects. Each object: question field with the question name, feedback text, complies boolean false. Provide minimal feedback. Ensure JSON array.
